stemHtml: Which statement about the tail ice-protection system is correct?

options.a: It is mandatory for aeroplanes to have a tail ice-protection system. The tail is protected from ice accretion by ram air.
options.b: The tail is protected from ice accretion by ram air.
options.c: It uses heat from hydraulic fluid running through the leading-edge pipelines.
options.d: Some aeroplane tails have ice-protection systems.
